variables.notes: R:c. Candidate list appears incomplete for SG&A: it misses major overhead rows clearly present in the income statement, especially Payroll and related costs and other recurring operating overhead components. No explicit single SG&A subtotal exists, so selected multiple overhead component rows from the full preview. Excluded D&A, amortization, impairments, restructuring, finance items, and COGS. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other operating costs, [Income Statement] Advertising Expense, [Income Statement] Bad Debt Written-Off/Provision, [Income Statement] Rental Expense, [Income Statement] Payroll and related costs, [Income Statement] Share Based Compensation
